query:
SELECT 
  TABLE_NAME,
  COLUMN_NAME,
  CONSTRAINT_NAME
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE
WHERE REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME = 'pools'
  AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2wStqi96Bwp1QsN.a3b8e3def1a1 --database dJv8mGehu4r2vn8N2SWpLW --execute 
SELECT 
  TABLE_NAME,
  COLUMN_NAME,
  CONSTRAINT_NAME
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE
WHERE REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME = 'pools'
  AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
